args.query: SELECT AVG(citation_count) AS avg_citations FROM Citations WHERE citation_year = 2018;

exec_args.sql: SELECT AVG(citation_count) AS avg_citations FROM Citations WHERE citation_year = 2018;

result.preview: "The average citation count for papers cited in 2018 is approximately 50.31 citations per paper. The query did not include source filtering, so this value is for all sources combined; the provided databases do not contain structured source (publisher) information to isolate ACM-only papers reliably."

args.answer: The average citation count for papers cited in 2018 is approximately 50.31 citations per paper. The query did not include source filtering, so this value is for all sources combined; the provided databases do not contain structured source (publisher) information to isolate ACM-only papers reliably.

val_args.answer: The average citation count for papers cited in 2018 is approximately 50.31 citations per paper. The query did not include source filtering, so this value is for all sources combined; the provided databases do not contain structured source (publisher) information to isolate ACM-only papers reliably.
